name: cognitime_verified_gaps
verification_method: direct file inspection of all .ts and .sql files in archive

fully_resolved.note: P0-G1 and P0-G4 resolved pre-repo. P1-G7 (Zod .refine() temporal validation) and P1-G8 (callOpenAIWithRetry with exponential backoff) confirmed present in src/lib/architect.functions.ts and src/lib/ledger.functions.ts.

remaining_gaps.title: Rate limit race condition — auth and guest paths

verified_evidence.checkRateLimit: Two-step select→upsert with explicit TODO comment: 'replace with an atomic RPC in Postgres to avoid a small read-modify-write race'
verified_evidence.enforceGuestRateLimit: Two-step maybeSingle()→upsert. Same race window present.

migrations_not_applied: increment_rate_limit(p_user_id, p_window, p_kind, p_limit) Postgres function — exists only as spec in gaps/refact-1/cognitime_remaining_gaps_1.json, NOT in any .sql migration file
increment_guest_rate_limit(p_ip_hash, p_window, p_limit) — same: spec only, not applied
code_not_changed: src/lib/architect.functions.ts :: checkRateLimit — still uses upsert, RPC call not wired
src/lib/architect.functions.ts :: enforceGuestRateLimit — still uses upsert, RPC call not wired

remaining_gaps.title: Server-side observability — OpenAI latency and embed failures

done: callOpenAIWithRetry logs attempt + duration_ms on success and failure (confirmed)

what_is_missing: createMap: const start = Date.now() is set but no structuredLog at completion — total handler wall time never logged
generateGuestMap: const start = Date.now() is set but never used in any structuredLog call — same omission
embed failures caught with console.warn only; not routed through structuredLog

remaining_gaps.title: Execution maps are immutable — no edit, reschedule, or delete

verified_evidence.execution_maps_schema: No archived_at or updated_at column in any migration (confirmed across all 9 .sql files)
verified_evidence.server_functions: No updatePhase, archiveMap, or deleteMap function anywhere in src/ (confirmed by grep)
verified_evidence.ui: No edit or archive controls in any route or component file

migrations: ALTER TABLE execution_maps ADD COLUMN archived_at timestamptz
ALTER TABLE execution_maps ADD COLUMN updated_at timestamptz NOT NULL DEFAULT now()
Trigger: touch updated_at on execution_maps UPDATE
ui: Per-phase edit controls in map detail view
Archive toggle and filter in map list

verified_evidence.tables_checked: Grepped all 9 migration .sql files — daily_metric_snapshots, openai_usage_log, rag_chunk_counts not present anywhere
verified_evidence.callOpenAI: OpenAI API response object is consumed for tool_calls only; usage.prompt_tokens and usage.completion_tokens are never read or logged
verified_evidence.token_count_note: rag_chunks.token_count column exists in schema and IS populated (character-length approximation: Math.ceil(s.length/4)); this is NOT actual OpenAI token accounting

code: src/lib/architect.functions.ts :: callOpenAI — read and log data.usage.prompt_tokens + completion_tokens

remaining_gaps.title: context_switch_count / re_ramp_minutes zero-filled from active sessions

verified_evidence.active_sessions_schema: active_sessions table (migrations/20260526212501 and 20260527041811) has no context_switch_count or re_ramp_minutes columns — confirmed by direct inspection
verified_evidence.complete_phase_session_rpc: Both migration versions (20260526222326 and 20260527090000) hardcode 'context_switch_count, re_ramp_minutes = 0, 0' in the INSERT into session_events
verified_evidence.completePhaseSession_server_fn: src/lib/session-tracker.functions.ts — accepts only session_id and notes; no parameters for either metric
verified_evidence.ActiveSessionPanel: src/components/ActiveSessionPanel.tsx — no increment buttons, no local state, no mutation calls for context_switch_count or re_ramp_minutes; explicit TODO comment in session-tracker.functions.ts: 'context_switch_count / re_ramp_minutes are captured only via LogModal manual entry; complete_phase_session zero-fills both'

what_is_missing.migration: ALTER TABLE active_sessions ADD COLUMN context_switch_count int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0; ALTER TABLE active_sessions ADD COLUMN re_ramp_minutes numeric NOT NULL DEFAULT 0
what_is_missing.rpc: Update complete_phase_session to read and propagate context_switch_count and re_ramp_minutes from active_sessions row into session_events INSERT
what_is_missing.server_fn: Update completePhaseSession input schema to optionally accept both values (or rely purely on the RPC reading from active_sessions columns)
what_is_missing.ui: Add increment buttons for both metrics in ActiveSessionPanel.tsx

remaining_gaps.title: RAG quality gate

verified_evidence.min_similarity: src/lib/architect.functions.ts line 223 — match_user_chunks called with min_similarity: 0.35 (confirmed)
verified_evidence.token_count_createMap: Lines 339+343 — tokenCounts populated and inserted into rag_chunks (confirmed)
verified_evidence.token_count_claimGuestMap: Lines 570+574 — tokenCounts also populated and inserted in claimGuestMap (confirmed)

gap_json_correction.field: P2-G10 in both source JSONs states 'claimGuestMap still needs token_count population'
gap_json_correction.finding: INCORRECT — claimGuestMap already populates token_count at lines 570-574 of src/lib/architect.functions.ts. This item is done.

what_is_missing: No TTL/staleness cron for rag_chunks anywhere in migrations (existing cron 'active_sessions_ttl_cleanup' covers active_sessions only, not rag_chunks)
